inputs.label: Outs
inputs.businessContext: Number of cards that complete your winning hand.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of cards that complete your winning hand.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Karten, die Ihre Gewinnhand vervollständigen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de cartes qui complètent votre main gagnante.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de cartas que completan tu mano ganadora.

inputs.label: Streets to Come
inputs.businessContext: Number of community cards remaining (1 for river only, 2 for turn and river).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of community cards remaining (1 for river only, 2 for turn and river).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalan topluluk kartı sayısı (sadece nehir için 1, dönüş ve nehir için 2).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der verbleibenden Gemeinschaftskarten (1 nur für River, 2 für Turn und River).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de cartes communautaires restantes (1 pour la rivière seulement, 2 pour le turn et la rivière).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de cartas comunitarias restantes (1 solo para el river, 2 para turn y river).

inputs.label: Pot Size
inputs.businessContext: Current size of the pot before calling.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current size of the pot before calling.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktuelle Größe des Pots vor dem Call.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taille actuelle du pot avant de suivre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tamaño actual del bote antes de igualar.

inputs.label: Bet to Call
inputs.businessContext: Amount you must call to stay in the hand.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount you must call to stay in the hand.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Oyunda kalmak için çağırmanız gereken miktar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Betrag, den Sie callen müssen, um in der Hand zu bleiben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant que vous devez suivre pour rester dans le coup.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad que debes igualar para permanecer en la mano.
